hypothesis.thesis_statement: In A-shares, higher Coskewness predicts lower cross-sectional forward returns (US predictor 'Coskewness', Harvey and Siddique 2000, JF). Test whether this published US anomaly ports to A-shares.
hypothesis.mechanism: OSAP economic category: risk. Proposed A-share build: price+index -> 'osap_coskewness_ashare'. Definition (US): Signal is the sample counterpart of $E[\tilde{r}_{it} \tilde{r}_{mt}^2]/( SD[\tilde{r}_{it} ] SD[\tilde{r}_{mt}]^2$ where $\tilde{r}_{it}$ is the de-meaned stock excess return and $\tilde{r}_{mt}$ is the de-meaned market excess return.  Signal is computed using the past 60 months

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: [DRAFT] The US 'Coskewness' effect may not survive A-share microstructure (T+1, limit boards, retail-dominated flow) or may be subsumed by existing risk factors after neutralization.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: [DRAFT] That the US accounting/price construction maps faithfully to Tushare A-share fields without definitional drift.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: [DRAFT] Sealed-OOS rank-ICIR below the committed band, or hard rules failing after realistic costs.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: [DRAFT] Review turnover at the chosen rebalance before committing.

todo_before_registering: Implement factor 'osap_coskewness_ashare' in factor_library (map US definition -> A-share Tushare/Qlib fields; PIT-safe Ref(...,1)).
CONFIRM not a duplicate of existing catalog factors in category 'risk' (heuristic flag = REVIEW).
SET expected_effect = YOUR A-share prediction (point + CI + horizon). Do NOT copy us_evidence_context_only above.
CONFIRM the OOS window is unburned for this design before registering.
